summary: Completed testing of 3 new features: (1) heaterVariants pricing on product cards - dual prices for models with 2 variants, single price for models with 1 variant; (2) RequestForm with full order summary showing model+price, options, total; (3) Admin SVG style selectors - 3 styles for schematic (default/minimal/blueprint) and 3 styles for stove (default/minimal/detailed). All features verified working.
passed_tests: API: round_225 model has heaterVariants with integrated (10,990 PLN) and external (9,690 PLN) prices
API: square_170x200 model has only external heater available (11,690 PLN)
API: Products have api_model_id mapping to calculator models
API: Content API returns svg_style fields for schematic and stove types
API: Saving schematic svg_style (default/minimal/blueprint) works
API: Saving stove svg_style (default/minimal/detailed) per stove type works
API: Contact API accepts order data with model, options, total
FRONTEND: Product card 'Okrągła 200cm' shows DUAL prices (z piecem wewn. 10,990 PLN / z piecem zewn. 9,690 PLN)
FRONTEND: Product card 'Kwadratowa 170x200cm' shows SINGLE price (11,690 PLN)
FRONTEND: Product modal has heater selector with variant prices from heaterVariants
FRONTEND: Heater selector shows 'Piec wewnetrzny 10,990 PLN' and 'Piec zewnetrzny 9,690 PLN'
FRONTEND: Request form (data-testid='balie-request-form') opens from modal
FRONTEND: Request form shows order summary (data-testid='request-order-summary') with model name and price
FRONTEND: Request form shows total price (data-testid='request-total-price')
ADMIN: Схемы tab (data-testid='balia-content-tab-schemes') accessible in КУПЕЛИ > Контент
ADMIN: Schematic section has 3 SVG style buttons (Классическая/Минимализм/Чертёж)
ADMIN: Internal stove has 3 SVG style buttons (Классическая/Минимализм/Детальная)
ADMIN: External stove has 3 SVG style buttons (Классическая/Минимализм/Детальная)
FRONTEND: BalieSchematic renders SVG based on saved svg_style (blueprint style verified)
FRONTEND: BalieStoveScheme renders different SVG per stove type (internal/external) based on svg_style
critical_code_review_comments: BalieProducts.jsx correctly implements getHeaterVariantPrices() to filter heaterVariants by availableHeaterTypes
ProductCard shows dual prices when variants.length >= 2, single price when single variant exists
RequestForm correctly displays order summary with model name, price, options breakdown, and total
BaliaContentAdmin.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for all SVG style buttons
BalieSchematic.jsx uses svgComponents map to render correct SVG based on svg_style
BalieStoveScheme.jsx uses stoveSvgs map with nested structure for stove type + style
seed_data_creation: Test data created via API: schematic with svg_style='blueprint', stove types with svg_style='detailed'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 tested 3 new features: (1) heaterVariants pricing - round_225 has 2 variants (integrated 10990, external 9690), square_170x200 has 1 variant (external 11690). Product cards show dual/single prices accordingly. (2) RequestForm order summary - data-testid='balie-request-form' contains data-testid='request-order-summary' with model+price, options, total. (3) Admin SVG styles - data-testid='schematic-style-{default|minimal|blueprint}' and data-testid='stove-style-{internal|external}-{default|minimal|detailed}'. Frontend components BalieSchematic and BalieStoveScheme render correct SVG based on saved svg_style.

heater_variants_pricing.details: Product cards show dual prices for models with 2 heater variants, single price for models with 1 variant

request_form_order_summary.details: RequestForm shows full order summary with model name+price, options breakdown, and total

admin_svg_style_selectors.details: Schematic has 3 styles (default/minimal/blueprint), each stove type has 3 styles (default/minimal/detailed)

frontend_svg_rendering.details: BalieSchematic and BalieStoveScheme render correct SVG based on saved svg_style
